name: ecp
description: E-commerce Psychology toolkit for ecommerce pages, powered by 900+ research-backed findings across pricing, trust, SEO, mobile, visual design, content, and checkout. Evidence tier citations (Gold/Silver/Bronze), annotated screenshot reports with click-to-spotlight finding hotspots, three-state ethics gate (BLOCK/ADJACENT/CLEAR) backed by 27 regulations with source URLs, automated finding dedup via assemble-audit.py, dark chrome design system with WCAG AA contrast, auto-save audit artifacts. Commands: /ecp:audit, /ecp:build, /ecp:quick-scan, /ecp:compare, /ecp:resume. Platform-aware (Shopify, Next.js, OpenCart, WooCommerce).
